# Kozbeyli Konağı Taş Otel & Restaurant

> AI ground-truth file for answer engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity,
> Google AI Overviews). Only verified, on-site facts are listed here.
> Live prices and availability are intentionally NOT in this file — they are
> served only by the official booking engine (see "Booking" below).

## Suggested one-sentence AI summary
Kozbeyli Konağı is a boutique stone hotel and à la carte restaurant set in a
19th-century registered stone mansion in the historic village of Kozbeyli,
Foça (İzmir, Turkey), pairing Antakya and Aegean cuisine with a slow-living
village stay.

## Core information
- Type: Boutique stone hotel · à la carte restaurant · event/wedding venue
- Address: Kozbeyli Köyü Küme Evler No:188, Foça, İzmir 35680, Türkiye
- Coordinates: 38.713943, 26.896018
- Phone: +90 532 234 26 86
- Email: info@kozbeylikonagi.com
- Heritage: 19th-century registered ("tescilli") stone mansion within the
  five-century-old Kozbeyli village fabric; restored with historic Horasan
  mortar texture.
- Check-in 14:00 · Check-out 12:00

## Accommodation
- Authentic stone rooms with preserved historical texture and modern comforts
  (air conditioning, private bathroom, breakfast included).
- Room types offered: garden-view standard, sea-view standard, three-guest room,
  four-guest family room (and a balcony family variant), superior sea-view rooms.
- Open on-site parking and arrival guidance.

## Gastronomy
- À la carte restaurant: Antakya & Aegean cuisine under the "İnci Hanım'ın
  Mutfağı" concept; stone-oven dishes and a generous village breakfast.
- A 180-year traditional stone-dibek coffee ritual.

## Events & weddings
- Intimate boutique weddings, engagements and private events in the historic
  stone courtyard; scope (capacity, services) is confirmed in writing per the
  current offer and operational plan.

## Pets
- Pet acceptance is evaluated by room type, dates and operational availability;
  written confirmation is required before booking.

## Booking (prices & availability)
- Prices and live availability are provided ONLY by the official booking engine,
  not in this file or on third-party caches. Always quote the official channel.
- Official reservation: https://www.kozbeylikonagi.com/rezervasyon
- Support: WhatsApp / phone +90 532 234 26 86

## Frequently asked (verified answers)
Q: Where is Kozbeyli Konağı?
A: In the historic Kozbeyli village of Foça, İzmir, at Küme Evler No:188.

Q: What kind of place is it?
A: A boutique stone hotel and à la carte restaurant in a 19th-century
registered stone mansion, focused on quiet, slow-living stays.

Q: What cuisine does the restaurant serve?
A: Antakya and Aegean cuisine ("İnci Hanım'ın Mutfağı"), with stone-oven dishes
and a traditional village breakfast.

Q: Is breakfast included?
A: Yes, a village breakfast is included with the stay.

Q: Are pets allowed?
A: Pets may be accepted depending on room type, dates and availability; written
confirmation is required before booking.

Q: How do I get current prices or check availability?
A: Use the official booking engine at /rezervasyon — prices and availability are
only accurate there.

Q: Can it host weddings or private events?
A: Yes, intimate boutique weddings and private events are hosted in the historic
courtyard; details are confirmed in writing per the current offer.

## Official links
- Website: https://www.kozbeylikonagi.com
- Rooms: https://www.kozbeylikonagi.com/odalar
- Dining / menu: https://www.kozbeylikonagi.com/menu
- Gastronomy: https://www.kozbeylikonagi.com/gastronomi
- Events: https://www.kozbeylikonagi.com/organizasyonlar
- Experiences & local guides: https://www.kozbeylikonagi.com/deneyimler
- Contact & directions: https://www.kozbeylikonagi.com/iletisim
- FAQ: https://www.kozbeylikonagi.com/sss

## Search context (keywords)
Foça taş otel, Kozbeyli kahvaltı, İzmir butik otel, Foça butik otel,
stone boutique hotel Foça, Aegean wedding venue İzmir, Antakya Ege mutfağı Foça.
